promotionDelta: Generate and verify package, registry, documentation, and public subpath outputs.
Pass packed consumers and package/source parity.
Complete multi-thumb keyboard, track press, pointer drag, touch cancellation, collision, and boundary fixtures in every supported engine.
Verify distinct accessible names, native form names, reset, disabled omission, read-only success, and external form association.
Record horizontal, vertical, RTL, narrow, zoom, forced-colors, and overlapping-thumb geometry.
Complete localized currency, percent, unit, and non-Latin value-text fixtures.
Verify intelligent marks, value bubbles, collision announcements, and complete disabled-enhancement absence across generated consumers.
Publish current manual assistive-technology evidence and an approved Quality Passport.
